---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or Use Case

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one better?

## Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Trust levels / governance pipeline
- [ ] Manners compliance scoring
- [ ] Audit chain / logging
- [ ] API endpoints
- [ ] Agent management
- [ ] Dashboard / console
- [ ] Deployment / Docker
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or additional details.
